commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the king of Babylon made Mattaniah his father's brother king in his stead, and changed his name to Zedekiah. Uncle, the third son of Josias, who was placed on the throne. (Haydock) The eldest, (Menochius) called Johanan, seems to have died in his youth. (Calmet) Sedecias means, "the justice of God "(Tirinus) as Nabuchodonosor had adjured him, or made him swear by God; (2 Paralipomenon xxxvi. ; Haydock) and thus insinuated, that, if he proved faithless, he should feel the effects of God's justice, as it happened.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
